sub_mechanisms: M_1: encode problem state into a continued-fraction representation
M_2: expand convergents (p_k/q_k) of the underlying irrational
M_3: choose reasoning chain step length = p_k or q_k
M_4: assemble chain in phase-coherent order
stripped_llm_application: Reasoning chain step lengths chosen from convergents of a continued-fraction representation of the problem state; the convergent sequence dictates step granularity, achieving phase-coherent step alignment with the problem's underlying scale.
novelty_claim_stripped: CoT schedules use heuristic step lengths or learned policy; no scheme uses continued-fraction-convergent step lengths for reasoning-chain assembly.
